use_codes.desc: ADJUNCT TO DIET AND EXERCISE TO IMPROVE GLYCEMIC CONTROL IN ADULTS WITH TYPE 2 DIABETES MELLITUS WHEN TREATMENT  WITH BOTH SAXAGLIPTIN AND METFORMIN IS APPROPRIATE
METHOD FOR TREATING TYPE II DIABETES MELLITUS BY ADMINISTERING SAXAGLIPTIN IN COMBINATION WITH METFORMIN
